titles.title: I Wanna Be Home/Praise The Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm so homesick for heaven I'm so excited to be with You I want to see the day When You'll wipe away my tears My cry, Oh Lord I wanna be home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I wanna be home I wanna be home When all the trials are over And all the storms had passed I wanna be home I wanna be home Back to You, Oh Lord I wanna be home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's full of pleasure in this world Satan is pulling me just to stay here But deep within my heart I'm not happy anymore There's a place that I will be And I call it home

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For this world is not my home I'm just a pilgrim and a stranger here I know that someday soon And it's very soon The Lord will take me home

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Praise the Lord Praise the Lord let all God's people praise the Lord shake off those heavy bands lift up those holy hands let all God's people praise the Lord
